bird.name: Maroon-chested ground dove
bird.summary: The maroon-chested ground dove (Paraclaravis mondetoura) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is native to the American Cordil…

locations.name: 科迪勒拉山系
locations.summary: 美洲科迪勒拉山系（英語：American Cordillera；西班牙語：Cordillera Americana）是南北美洲大陆西端的众多山脉系统的统称，北起阿拉斯加，南到火地岛，绵延约15,000公里（9,300英里），是世界上最长的…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Maroon-chested ground dove
relations.evidence: It is native to the American Cordillera of Central and South America

relations.subject: Maroon-chested ground dove
relations.evidence: inca, Peru and west central Bolivia The maroon-chested ground dove inhabits dense undergrowth in wet montane forest, its edges, and thickets of secondary forest

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Maroon-chested ground dove
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the maroon-chested ground dove as being of Least Concern. However, it is considered uncommon to rare, and is "[p]robably in danger of decline if heavy deforestation continues throughout its range."
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
